_story: Labs below active-disease thresholds. Step therapy incomplete. Denied in 44 minutes with exact policy citation.

diagnosis.description: Crohn's disease of large intestine without complications

deny_reasons: CRP 4.1 mg/L — does not meet active-disease threshold (required >10 mg/L). Guideline: GL-CROHN-BIOLOGIC-003, Section 2.1.
Calprotectin 180 mcg/g — does not meet active-disease threshold (required >250 mcg/g). Guideline: GL-CROHN-BIOLOGIC-003, Section 2.2.
Step therapy incomplete — only one agent documented (Mesalamine). Guideline requires documented failure of Mesalamine PLUS immunomodulator (azathioprine or 6-MP).
